3	import json
4	import os
5	import re
6	import shutil
7	import tempfile
8	import torch
9	from contextlib import contextmanager
10	from copy import copy
11	from functools import partial
12	from inspect import Parameter, Signature, signature
13	from modelscope import snapshot_download
14	from peft.utils import CONFIG_NAME
15	from peft.utils.other import SAFETENSORS_WEIGHTS_NAME, WEIGHTS_NAME
16	from torch import nn
17	from transformers import Trainer as HfTrainer
18	from transformers.utils import is_torch_npu_available
19	from types import MethodType
20	from typing import Dict, List, Literal, Optional, Union
21	
22	from swift.utils import get_device_count, get_logger
23	from swift.utils.constants import DEFAULT_ADAPTER, SWIFT_TYPE_KEY
24	from .mapping import SwiftTuners
25	from .peft import PeftConfig, PeftModel, get_peft_model
26	from .utils import SwiftConfig, SwiftOutput
27	
28	logger = get_logger()
29	
30	
31	class SwiftModel(nn.Module):
32	    """The Swift wrapper model.
33	
34	    Args:
35	        model (`Union[nn.Module, 'SwiftModel']`) A module to be tuned by Swift.
36	        config (`Union[SwiftConfig, Dict[str, SwiftConfig]]`) A config or a dict of {adapter_name: SwiftConfig}.
37	            If it's a config class, the adapter_name will be `default`
38	        extra_state_keys (`List[str]`, `optional`) A list of regex to match the extra state keys to be saved.
39	        inference_mode (bool, `optional`): Load model at inference mode, default False.
40	    """
41	
42	    EXTRA_STATE_DIR = 'extra_states'
43	
44	    def __init__(self,
45	                 model: Union[nn.Module, 'SwiftModel'],
46	                 config: Union[SwiftConfig, Dict[str, SwiftConfig]],
47	                 extra_state_keys: List[str] = None,
48	                 inference_mode: bool = False,
49	                 **kwargs):
50	        super().__init__()
51	        self.adapters = {}
52	        self.active_adapters = set()
53	        if isinstance(model, SwiftModel):
54	            self.adapters = model.adapters
55	            extra_state_keys = extra_state_keys or []
56	            extra_state_keys.extend(model.extra_state_keys)
57	            self.active_adapters = model.active_adapters
58	            model = model.base_model
59	
60	        self.base_model = model
61	        new_adapters = []
62	        if isinstance(config, SwiftConfig):
63	            if DEFAULT_ADAPTER not in self.adapters:
64	                all_parts = self._deactivate_all_parts()
65	                self.adapters[DEFAULT_ADAPTER] = self._prepare_model(model, config, DEFAULT_ADAPTER)
66	                for part in all_parts:
67	                    self.activate_adapter(part)
68	                new_adapters.append(DEFAULT_ADAPTER)
69	                if self.adapters[DEFAULT_ADAPTER].model is not None:
70	                    self.base_model = self.adapters[DEFAULT_ADAPTER].model
71	            else:
72	                logger.warn(f'Adapter {DEFAULT_ADAPTER} has been patched, skip.')
73	        elif isinstance(config, dict):
74	            assert (all(isinstance(c, SwiftConfig) for c in config.values()))
75	            for adapter_name, _config in config.items():
76	                if adapter_name not in self.adapters:
77	                    all_parts = self._deactivate_all_parts()
78	                    self.adapters[adapter_name] = self._prepare_model(model, _config, adapter_name)
79	                    for part in all_parts:
80	                        self.activate_adapter(part)
81	                    new_adapters.append(adapter_name)
82	                    if self.adapters[adapter_name].model is not None:
83	                        self.base_model = self.adapters[adapter_name].model
84	                else:
85	                    logger.warn(f'Adapter {adapter_name} has been patched, skip.')
86	
87	        self.extra_state_keys = extra_state_keys or []
88	        self.has_additional_modules = any([c.config.has_additional_modules for c in self.adapters.values()])
89	
90	        def forward(self, *args, **kwargs):
91	            return self.base_model(*args, **kwargs)
92	
93	        _parameters = [Parameter('self', Parameter.POSITIONAL_ONLY)]
94	        _parameters += list(signature(self.base_model.forward).parameters.values())
95	        forward.__signature__ = Signature(_parameters)
96	        self.forward = MethodType(forward, self)
97	        for adapter_name in new_adapters:
98	            self.activate_adapter(adapter_name)
99	
100	        if inference_mode:
101	            self.eval()
102	        else:
103	            for key, output in self.adapters.items():
104	                if key in new_adapters:
105	                    output.mark_trainable_callback(model)
106	            if self.extra_state_keys:
107	                for n, p in model.named_parameters():
108	                    if any(re.fullmatch(extra_key, n) for extra_key in self.extra_state_keys):
109	                        p.requires_grad = True
110	
111	    @property
112	    def model(self):
113	        return self.base_model
114	
115	    def _deactivate_all_parts(self):
116	        deactivated = []
117	        for adapter in self.active_adapters:
118	            output = self.adapters[adapter]
119	            if output.config.swift_type == SwiftTuners.PART:
120	                deactivated.append(adapter)
121	                self.deactivate_adapter(adapter)
122	        return deactivated
123	
124	    def load_state_dict(self, state_dict, strict=True, adapter_name: str = None):
125	        if adapter_name is not None:
126	            output: SwiftOutput = self.adapters[adapter_name]
127	            if getattr(output.config, 'modules_to_save', None):
128	                for key, value in copy(state_dict).items():
129	                    for module_name in output.config.modules_to_save:
130	                        if module_name in key:
131	                            state_dict.pop(key)
132	                            key = key.replace(module_name, f'{module_name}.modules_to_save.{adapter_name}')
133	                            break
134	                    state_dict[key] = value
135	
136	            for key, value in copy(state_dict).items():
137	                if key.startswith('base_model.model.'):
138	                    state_dict.pop(key, None)
139	                    key = key[len('base_model.model.'):]
140	                if f'lora_A.{adapter_name}.' not in key and 'lora_A' in key:
141	                    state_dict.pop(key, None)
142	                    key = key.replace('lora_A.', f'lora_A.{adapter_name}.')
143	                if f'lora_B.{adapter_name}.' not in key and 'lora_B' in key:
144	                    state_dict.pop(key, None)
145	                    key = key.replace('lora_B.', f'lora_B.{adapter_name}.')
146	                if f'lora_embedding_A.{adapter_name}.' not in key and 'lora_embedding_A' in key:
147	                    state_dict.pop(key, None)
148	                    key = key.replace('lora_embedding_A.', f'lora_embedding_A.{adapter_name}.')
149	                if f'lora_embedding_B.{adapter_name}.' not in key and 'lora_embedding_B' in key:
150	                    state_dict.pop(key, None)
151	                    key = key.replace('lora_embedding_B.', f'lora_embedding_B.{adapter_name}.')
152	                state_dict[key] = value
153	
154	            if output.load_state_dict_callback:
155	                state_dict = output.load_state_dict_callback(self.base_model, adapter_name, state_dict)
156	
157	        incompatible_keys = self.base_model.load_state_dict(state_dict, False)
158	        if incompatible_keys and len(incompatible_keys[1]) > 0:
159	            logger.error(f'Load state dict with unexpected keys: {incompatible_keys[1]}')
160	
161	    def state_dict(self,
162	                   *args,
163	                   destination=None,
164	                   prefix='',
165	                   keep_vars=False,
166	                   adapter_name: str = None,
167	                   peft_format: bool = False,
168	                   **kwargs):
169	        """
170	        Args:
171	            destination (`dict`, `optional`): If provided, the state of module will
172	                be updated into the dict and the same object is returned.
173	                Otherwise, an ``OrderedDict`` will be created and returned.
174	                Default: ``None``.
175	            prefix (`str`, `optional`): a prefix added to parameter and buffer
176	                names to compose the keys in state_dict. Default: ``''``.
177	            keep_vars (`bool`, `optional`): by default the :class:`~torch.Tensor` s
178	                returned in the state dict are detached from autograd. If it's
179	                set to ``True``, detaching will not be performed.
180	                Default: ``False``.
181	            adapter_name (`str`, `optional`): The name of the adapter's parameters to be saved,
182	                `None` input will save all adapters.
183	            peft_format (`bool`, `optional`): Save with peft format (extra `base_model.model.` prefix)
184	            **kwargs:
185	                save_adapter(`bool`): Save adapters or not, default True
186	                save_extra_states(`bool`): Save extra states or not, default True
187	        Returns:
188	            The state dict to be saved.
189	        """
190	        state_dict = kwargs.get('state_dict')
191	        if state_dict is None:
192	            state_dict = self.base_model.state_dict(destination=destination, prefix=prefix, keep_vars=keep_vars)
193	        state_dict = {
194	            key[len('base_model.'):] if key.startswith('base_model.') else key: value
195	            for key, value in state_dict.items()
196	        }
197	        if not self.has_additional_modules:
198	            return state_dict
199	
200	        state_dicts = {}
201	        if kwargs.get('save_adapter', True):
202	            for name, output in self.adapters.items():
203	                if (adapter_name == name or adapter_name is None) and output.config.has_additional_modules:  # noqa
204	                    state_dicts.update(output.state_dict_callback(state_dict, name))
205	                    modules_to_save_names = [
206	                        sub_name for sub_name, _ in self.base_model.named_parameters()
207	                        if f'modules_to_save.{name}' in sub_name
208	                    ]
209	                    for module_name in modules_to_save_names:
210	                        if f'modules_to_save.{name}' in module_name:
211	                            state_dicts[module_name.replace(f'modules_to_save.{name}.', '')] = state_dict[module_name]
212	        if kwargs.get('save_extra_states', True):
213	            state_dicts.update({
214	                k: v
215	                for k, v in state_dict.items() if any(
216	                    re.fullmatch(extra_key, k) for extra_key in self.extra_state_keys)
217	            })
218	        if peft_format:
219	            new_state_dict = {}
220	            for key, value in state_dicts.items():
221	                if not key.startswith('base_model.model.'):
222	                    key = 'base_model.model.' + key
223	                key = key.replace(f'lora_A.{adapter_name}.', 'lora_A.')
224	                key = key.replace(f'lora_B.{adapter_name}.', 'lora_B.')
225	                key = key.replace(f'lora_embedding_A.{adapter_name}.', 'lora_embedding_A.')
226	                key = key.replace(f'lora_embedding_B.{adapter_name}.', 'lora_embedding_B.')
227	                new_state_dict[key] = value
228	            state_dicts = new_state_dict
229	        return state_dicts
230	
231	    def __getattr__(self, key: str):
232	        """Forward missing attributes to the wrapped module."""
233	        try:
234	            return super().__getattr__(key)
235	        except AttributeError:
236	            if 'base_model' in dir(self):
237	                return getattr(self.base_model, key)
238	            raise
239	
240	    @staticmethod
241	    def load_state_file(path, device: Optional[str] = None):
242	        """Load a state dict file by the input path.
243	
244	        Args:
245	            path: The local dir to load the state file.
246	
247	        Returns:
248	            The state dict.
249	        """
250	        if device is None:
251	            if torch.cuda.is_available():
252	                device = 'cuda'
253	            elif is_torch_npu_available():
254	                device = 'npu'
255	            else:
256	                device = 'cpu'
257	        if os.path.exists(os.path.join(path, SAFETENSORS_WEIGHTS_NAME)):
258	            filename = os.path.join(path, SAFETENSORS_WEIGHTS_NAME)
259	            from safetensors.torch import load_file as safe_load_file
260	            return safe_load_file(filename, device=device)
261	        elif os.path.exists(os.path.join(path, WEIGHTS_NAME)):
262	            raise NotImplementedError(f'SWIFT does not support {WEIGHTS_NAME} to prevent malicious code. '
263	                                      f'Using safetensors instead.')
264	        return None
265	
266	    def create_optimizer_param_groups(self, **defaults):
267	        all_param_names = set()
268	        param_groups = []
269	        for output in self.adapters.values():
270	            if output.optimizer_group_callback:
271	                param_names, param_group = output.optimizer_group_callback(self.model, **defaults)
272	                if param_names and all_param_names & param_names:
273	                    raise ValueError('Cannot set one parameter to different param groups')
274	                if param_names and param_group:
275	                    all_param_names.update(param_names)
276	                    param_groups.extend(param_group)
277	
278	        decay_parameters = HfTrainer.get_decay_parameter_names(None, self.model)
279	        param_groups.extend([
280	            {
281	                'params': [
282	                    p for n, p in self.model.named_parameters()
283	                    if (n in decay_parameters and n not in all_param_names and p.requires_grad)
284	                ],
285	                'weight_decay':
286	                defaults['weight_decay'],
287	            },
288	            {
289	                'params': [
290	                    p for n, p in self.model.named_parameters()
291	                    if (n not in decay_parameters and n not in all_param_names and p.requires_grad)
292	                ],
293	                'weight_decay':
294	                0.0,
295	            },
296	        ])
297	
298	        return param_groups
299	
300	    @classmethod
301	    def from_pretrained(cls,
302	                        model: Union[nn.Module, 'SwiftModel'],
303	                        model_id: str = None,
304	                        adapter_name: Union[str, List[str], Dict[str, str]] = None,
305	                        inference_mode: bool = True,
306	                        revision: str = None,
307	                        **kwargs):
308	        """Load a set of tuners and corresponding weights by a model_id.
309	
310	        Args:
311	            model (`Union[torch.nn.Module, 'SwiftModel']`): The model to be tuned,
312	                if the model is already a `SwiftModel` it will be un-wrapped and re-wrapped..
313	            model_id (`str`): The model_id or a local model dir of tuners to use to tune the model.
314	            adapter_name (`Union[str, List[str], Dict[str, str]]`): The adapter_names saved in the model repo to load.
315	                Default `None`, means load all tuners saved in the model_id
316	            inference_mode (`bool`): Use in the inference mode or not.
317	            revision (`str`): The model revision to use.
318	            **kwargs:
319	                extra_state_keys (`List[str]`, `optional`) A list of regex to match the extra state keys to be saved.
320	                Other parameters will be passed to the device_map.
321	        Returns:
322	            The `SwiftModel` instance.
323	        """
324	        adapters = {}
325	        model_dir = model_id
326	        if not os.path.exists(model_dir):
327	            model_dir = snapshot_download(model_dir, revision=revision)
328	        if os.path.isfile(model_dir):
329	            raise ValueError(f'Please pass in a local dir or a model id, not a local file: {model_dir}')
330	        extra_state_keys = kwargs.pop('extra_state_keys', None)
331	        if extra_state_keys is None and os.path.isfile(os.path.join(model_dir, cls.EXTRA_STATE_DIR, CONFIG_NAME)):
332	            with open(os.path.join(model_dir, cls.EXTRA_STATE_DIR, CONFIG_NAME), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as file:
333	                _json = json.load(file)
334	                extra_state_keys = _json.get('extra_state_keys')
335	        if adapter_name is None:
336	            adapter_name = [
337	                sub_dir for sub_dir in os.listdir(model_dir)
338	                if os.path.isfile(os.path.join(model_dir, sub_dir, CONFIG_NAME)) and sub_dir != cls.EXTRA_STATE_DIR
339	            ]
340	        for _name in adapter_name if isinstance(adapter_name,
341	                                                list) else [adapter_name] \
342	                if isinstance(adapter_name, str) else adapter_name.keys():
343	            sub_folder = os.path.join(model_dir, _name)
344	            config_file = os.path.join(sub_folder, CONFIG_NAME)
345	
346	            if not os.path.isfile(config_file):
347	                logger.warning(f'{_name} is not a valid tuner')
348	                continue
349	
350	            with open(config_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as file:
351	                json_object = json.load(file)
352	
353	            if SWIFT_TYPE_KEY not in json_object:
354	                raise ValueError('Mixed using with peft is not allowed now.')
355	            else:
356	                key = _name if not isinstance(adapter_name, dict) else adapter_name[_name]
357	                adapters[key] = SwiftConfig.from_pretrained(sub_folder)
358	
359	        self = SwiftModel(model, adapters, extra_state_keys, inference_mode, **kwargs)
360	        for _name in adapter_name if isinstance(adapter_name,
361	                                                list) else [adapter_name] \
362	                if isinstance(adapter_name, str) else adapter_name.keys():
363	            _adapter = _name if not isinstance(adapter_name, dict) else adapter_name[_name]
364	            output: SwiftOutput = self.adapters[_adapter]
365	            sub_folder = os.path.join(model_dir, _name)
366	            if output.load_callback:
367	                output.load_callback(self, sub_folder, _adapter)
368	                continue
369	            state_dict = cls.load_state_file(sub_folder)
370	            if state_dict is not None:
371	                if isinstance(adapter_name, dict):
372	                    # TODO this logic is fragile! replace `_name` may cause other parts replaced
373	                    state_dict = {key.replace(_name, adapter_name[_name]): value for key, value in state_dict.items()}
374	                self.load_state_dict(state_dict, adapter_name=_adapter)
375	        state_dict = cls.load_state_file(os.path.join(model_dir, self.EXTRA_STATE_DIR))
376	        if state_dict is not None:
377	            self.load_state_dict(state_dict)
378	        return self
379	
380	    @classmethod
381	    def _prepare_model(
382	        cls,
383	        model: nn.Module,
384	        config: SwiftConfig,
385	        adapter_name: str,
386	    ):
387	        assert (hasattr(config, SWIFT_TYPE_KEY))
388	        from .mapping import SWIFT_MAPPING
389	
390	        adapter_cls = SWIFT_MAPPING[config.swift_type][1]
391	        if adapter_cls.has_additional_modules() and not getattr(model, 'model_frozen', False):
392	            for _, p in model.named_parameters():
393	                p.requires_grad = False
394	            model.model_frozen = True
395	        config.has_additional_modules = adapter_cls.has_additional_modules()
396	        return adapter_cls.prepare_model(model, config, adapter_name)

398	    def create_or_update_model_card(self, output_dir: str):
399	        """
400	        Updates or create the model card.
401	        """
402	        if not os.path.exists(os.path.join(output_dir, 'README.md')):
403	            lines = []
404	        else:
405	            with open(os.path.join(output_dir, 'README.md'), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
406	                lines = f.readlines()
407	
408	        quantization_config = None
409	        if hasattr(self.base_model, 'config') and hasattr(self.base_model.config, 'quantization_config'):
410	            if hasattr(self.base_model.config.quantization_config, 'to_dict'):
411	                quantization_config = self.base_model.config.quantization_config.to_dict()
412	        training_config_text = ''
413	        # Adds quantization information if it was used
414	        if quantization_config is not None:
415	            training_config_text += '\nThe following `bitsandbytes` quantization config was used during training:\n'
416	            training_config_text += '\n'.join([f'- {name}: {value}' for name, value in quantization_config.items()])
417	            training_config_text += '\n'
418	
419	        training_procedure_heading = '## Training procedure\n'
420	        if training_procedure_heading in lines:
421	            lines.insert(lines.index(training_procedure_heading) + 2, training_config_text)
422	        else:
423	            lines.append(f'{training_procedure_heading}\n{training_config_text}')
424	
425	        framework_block_heading = '### Framework versions\n'
426	        from swift.version import __version__
427	        if framework_block_heading in lines:
428	            lines.insert(lines.index(framework_block_heading) + 2, f'- SWIFT {__version__}\n')
429	        else:
430	            lines.append(f'{framework_block_heading}\n\n- SWIFT {__version__}\n')
431	
432	        base_model_heading = '### Base model information\n'
433	        lines.append(f'{base_model_heading}\n\n- BaseModel Class {self.base_model.__class__.__name__}\n')
434	
435	        # write the lines back to README.md
436	        with open(os.path.join(output_dir, 'README.md'), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
437	            f.writelines(lines)

439	    def add_weighted_adapter(
440	        self,
441	        adapters,
442	        weights,
443	        adapter_name,
444	        combination_type='svd',
445	        svd_rank=None,
446	        svd_clamp=None,
447	        svd_full_matrices=True,
448	        svd_driver=None,
449	        density=None,
450	        majority_sign_method: Literal['total', 'frequency'] = 'total',
451	    ):
452	        """
453	        This method adds a new adapter by merging the given adapters with the given weights.
454	
455	        When using the `cat` combination_type you should be aware that rank of the resulting adapter will be equal to
456	        the sum of all adapters ranks. So it's possible that the mixed adapter may become too big and result in OOM
457	        errors.
458	
459	        Args:
460	            adapters (`list`):
461	                List of adapter names to be merged.
462	            weights (`list`):
463	                List of weights for each adapter.
464	            adapter_name (`str`):
465	                Name of the new adapter.
466	            combination_type (`str`):
467	                The merging type can be one of [`svd`, `linear`, `cat`, `ties`, `ties_svd`, `dare_ties`, `dare_linear`,
468	                `dare_ties_svd`, `dare_linear_svd`, `magnitude_prune`, `magnitude_prune_svd`]. When using the `cat`
469	                combination_type, the rank of the resulting adapter is equal to the sum of all adapters ranks (the
470	                mixed adapter may be too big and result in OOM errors).
471	            svd_rank (`int`, *optional*):
472	                Rank of output adapter for svd. If None provided, will use max rank of merging adapters.
473	            svd_clamp (`float`, *optional*):
474	                A quantile threshold for clamping SVD decomposition output. If None is provided, do not perform
475	                clamping. Defaults to None.
476	            svd_full_matrices (`bool`, *optional*):
477	                Controls whether to compute the full or reduced SVD, and consequently, the shape of the returned
478	                tensors U and Vh. Defaults to True.
479	            svd_driver (`str`, *optional*):
480	                Name of the cuSOLVER method to be used. This keyword argument only works when merging on CUDA. Can be
481	                one of [None, `gesvd`, `gesvdj`, `gesvda`]. For more info please refer to `torch.linalg.svd`
482	                documentation. Defaults to None.
483	            density (`float`, *optional*):
484	                Value between 0 and 1. 0 means all values are pruned and 1 means no values are pruned. Should be used
485	                with [`ties`, `ties_svd`, `dare_ties`, `dare_linear`, `dare_ties_svd`, `dare_linear_svd`,
486	                `magnintude_prune`, `magnitude_prune_svd`]
487	            majority_sign_method (`str`):
488	                The method, should be one of ["total", "frequency"], to use to get the magnitude of the sign values.
489	                Should be used with [`ties`, `ties_svd`, `dare_ties`, `dare_ties_svd`]
490	        """
491	        from swift.tuners.lora import LoraModel
492	        lora_model = LoraModel(self.model, None, '')
493	        lora_model.peft_config = {key: value.config for key, value in self.adapters.items()}
494	        from peft.tuners.lora import LoraLayer
495	        lora_model.targeted_module_names = [
496	            key for key, value in self.model.named_modules() if isinstance(value, LoraLayer)
497	        ]
498	        lora_model.active_adapter = self.active_adapters
499	        lora_model.add_weighted_adapter(
500	            adapters=adapters,
501	            weights=weights,
502	            adapter_name=adapter_name,
503	            combination_type=combination_type,
504	            svd_rank=svd_rank,
505	            svd_clamp=svd_clamp,
506	            svd_full_matrices=svd_full_matrices,
507	            svd_driver=svd_driver,
508	            density=density,
509	            majority_sign_method=majority_sign_method,
510	        )
511	
512	        def state_dict_callback(state_dict, adapter_name, cfg):
513	            from swift.tuners.lora_layers import lora_state_dict
514	            return lora_state_dict(state_dict, adapter_name, cfg.bias)
515	
516	        def mark_trainable_callback(model, cfg):
517	            from swift.tuners.lora_layers import mark_lora_as_trainable
518	            mark_lora_as_trainable(model, adapter_name, cfg.bias)
519	
520	        cfg = lora_model.peft_config[adapter_name]
521	        cfg.has_additional_modules = True
522	        self.adapters[adapter_name] = SwiftOutput(
523	            config=cfg,
524	            state_dict_callback=partial(state_dict_callback, cfg=cfg),
525	            mark_trainable_callback=partial(mark_trainable_callback, cfg=cfg),
526	            optimizer_group_callback=None,
527	        )
528	
529	        self.set_active_adapters(adapter_name)
530	
531	    def save_pretrained(self,
532	                        save_directory: str,
533	                        safe_serialization: bool = True,
534	                        adapter_name: Union[str, List[str]] = None,
535	                        **kwargs):
536	        """Save the adapters to a local directory.
537	
538	        Args:
539	            save_directory (`str`): The directory to use.
540	            safe_serialization (`bool`): Use safe tensors to save the weights, default False.
541	            adapter_name(`Union[str, List[str]]`): The adapters to be saved, default is `None` to save all.
542	        """
543	        peft_format = kwargs.pop('peft_format', False)
544	        if os.path.isfile(save_directory):
545	            raise ValueError(f'Provided path ({save_directory}) should be a directory, not a file')
546	        os.makedirs(save_directory, exist_ok=True)
547	        if not self.has_additional_modules:
548	            if hasattr(self.base_model, 'save_pretrained'):
549	                self.base_model.save_pretrained(save_directory, safe_serialization=safe_serialization)
550	            else:
551	                self._save_state_dict(self.base_model.state_dict(), save_directory, safe_serialization)
552	                self.create_or_update_model_card(save_directory)
553	        else:
554	            self.create_or_update_model_card(save_directory)
555	
556	        adapter_names = adapter_name if isinstance(adapter_name, list) or adapter_name is None else [adapter_name]
557	
558	        state_dict_kwargs = {}
559	        state_dict = kwargs.get('state_dict')
560	        if state_dict is not None:
561	            state_dict_kwargs['state_dict'] = kwargs['state_dict']
562	        for adapter_name, output in self.adapters.items():
563	            if adapter_names is not None and adapter_name not in adapter_names:
564	                continue
565	
566	            save_to_peft = peft_format and output.config.swift_type == SwiftTuners.LORA
567	            save_to_peft = save_to_peft and output.config.can_be_saved_to_peft()
568	            if peft_format and not save_to_peft:
569	                logger.error('You are using additional lora parameters, which is not compatible with peft,'
570	                             'which is unable to save to peft format.')
571	            output_dir = os.path.join(save_directory,
572	                                      adapter_name) if adapter_name != 'default' or not save_to_peft else save_directory
573	
574	            if save_to_peft:
575	                config = output.config.to_peft_config()
576	                config.save_pretrained(output_dir)
577	            else:
578	                output.config.save_pretrained(output_dir)
579	
580	            if output.save_callback:
581	                output.save_callback(self, output_dir, adapter_name)
582	                continue
583	
584	            # save only the trainable weights
585	            output_state_dict = self.state_dict(
586	                adapter_name=adapter_name, save_extra_states=False, peft_format=save_to_peft, **state_dict_kwargs)
587	            os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)
588	            if output_state_dict and output.config.has_additional_modules:
589	                self._save_state_dict(output_state_dict, output_dir, safe_serialization)
590	
591	        output_state_dict = self.state_dict(save_extra_states=True, save_adapter=False, **state_dict_kwargs)
592	        if len(output_state_dict) > 0:
593	            if self.has_additional_modules:
594	                os.makedirs(os.path.join(save_directory, self.EXTRA_STATE_DIR), exist_ok=True)
595	                self._save_state_dict(output_state_dict, os.path.join(save_directory, self.EXTRA_STATE_DIR),
596	                                      safe_serialization)
597	                with open(
598	                        os.path.join(save_directory, self.EXTRA_STATE_DIR, CONFIG_NAME), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as file:
599	                    json.dump({'extra_state_keys': self.extra_state_keys}, file)
600	            else:
601	                logger.error('Full parameter training, save_extra_states will be ignored')
602	
603	        if not os.path.exists(os.path.join(save_directory, 'configuration.json')):
604	            with open(os.path.join(save_directory, 'configuration.json'), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
605	                f.write('{}')
606	
607	    @staticmethod
608	    def _save_state_dict(output_state_dict, save_directory, safe_serialization):
609	        if safe_serialization:
610	            from safetensors.torch import save_file as safe_save_file
611	            safe_save_file(
612	                output_state_dict, os.path.join(save_directory, SAFETENSORS_WEIGHTS_NAME), metadata={'format': 'pt'})
613	        else:
614	            torch.save(output_state_dict, os.path.join(save_directory, WEIGHTS_NAME))
615	
616	    @contextmanager
617	    def disable_adapter(self):
618	        try:
619	            self.set_active_adapters(adapter_names=[])
620	            yield
621	        finally:
622	            self.set_active_adapters(adapter_names=self.adapters.keys())
623	
624	    def set_active_adapters(self, adapter_names: Union[List[str], str], offload: str = None):
625	        """Set activated adapters
626	
627	        Args:
628	            adapter_names(`Union[List[str], str]`): The adapters needed to be activated
629	            offload(`str`): Whether to offload the deactivated ones to `cpu` or `meta` device
630	        """
631	        if not adapter_names:
632	            adapter_names = []
633	
634	        if isinstance(adapter_names, str):
635	            adapter_names = [adapter_names]
636	
637	        adapter_names = set(adapter_names)
638	        for adapter_name in (adapter_names & set(self.adapters.keys())):
639	            self.activate_adapter(adapter_name)
640	
641	        for adapter_name in (set(self.adapters.keys()) - adapter_names):
642	            self.deactivate_adapter(adapter_name, offload)
643	
644	        self.active_adapters = (adapter_names & set(self.adapters.keys()))
645	
646	    def activate_adapter(self, adapter_name: str):
647	        """Activate one adapter
648	
649	        Args:
650	            adapter_name(`str`): The adapter needed to be activated
651	        """
652	        if adapter_name not in self.adapters:
653	            logger.warning(f'{adapter_name} not in adapters: {self.adapters.keys()}')
654	            return
655	
656	        from .mapping import SWIFT_MAPPING
657	        SWIFT_MAPPING[self.adapters[adapter_name].config.swift_type][1]\
658	            .activate_adapter(self.base_model, adapter_name, True)
659	        self.active_adapters = self.active_adapters | {adapter_name}
660	
661	    def deactivate_adapter(self, adapter_name: str, offload: str = None):
662	        """Deactivate one adapter
663	
664	        Args:
665	            adapter_name(`str`): The adapter needed to be activated
666	            offload(`str`): Whether to offload to `cpu` or `meta` device
667	        """
668	        if adapter_name not in self.adapters:
669	            logger.warning(f'{adapter_name} not in adapters: {self.adapters.keys()}')
670	            return
671	
672	        from .mapping import SWIFT_MAPPING
673	        SWIFT_MAPPING[self.adapters[adapter_name].config.swift_type][1]\
674	            .activate_adapter(self.base_model, adapter_name, False, offload=offload)
675	        self.active_adapters = self.active_adapters - {adapter_name}
676	
677	    def get_trainable_parameters(self):
678	        """
679	        Get the content of trainable parameters in the model.
680	        """
681	        trainable_params = 0
682	        all_param = 0
683	        for _, param in self.base_model.named_parameters():
684	            num_params = param.numel()
685	            # if using DS Zero 3 and the weights are initialized empty
686	            if num_params == 0 and hasattr(param, 'ds_numel'):
687	                num_params = param.ds_numel
688	
689	            all_param += num_params
690	            if param.requires_grad:
691	                trainable_params += num_params
692	        return f'trainable params: {trainable_params:,d} || all params: {all_param:,d} ' \
693	               f'|| trainable%: {100 * trainable_params / all_param:.4f}' \
694	               '|| cuda memory: ' \
695	               f'{sum([torch.cuda.memory_allocated(i) for i in range(get_device_count())]) / 1024 / 1024 / 1024:.2f}' \
696	               'GiB.'

699	class Swift:
700	    """The Wrapper to use both Peft and Swift tuners."""
701	
702	    @staticmethod
703	    def prepare_model(model: Union[nn.Module, SwiftModel], config: Union[SwiftConfig, PeftConfig,
704	                                                                         Dict[str, SwiftConfig]], **kwargs):
705	        """Prepare a model by the input config.
706	
707	        Args:
708	            model(`Union[nn.Module, 'SwiftModel']`): The model to be tuned.
709	            config(`Union[SwiftConfig, PeftConfig, Dict[str, SwiftConfig]]`): The config or config dict, can be either
710	                SwiftConfigs or PeftConfigs
711	            **kwargs:
712	                Extra kwargs needed by SwiftModel or PeftModel.
713	        Returns:
714	            The model wrapped by SwiftModel or PeftModel.
715	        """
716	
717	        if isinstance(config, (SwiftConfig, dict)):
718	            return SwiftModel(model, config, **kwargs)
719	        else:
720	            return get_peft_model(model, config, **kwargs)
721	
722	    @staticmethod
723	    def merge_and_unload(model: Union[PeftModel, SwiftModel], **kwargs):
724	        """Merge tuners into the base model and unload them.
725	
726	        Args:
727	            model(`Union[PeftModel, SwiftModel]`): The model instance with tuners
728	            kwargs:
729	                adapter_name(`Union[str, List[str]]`): The adapter_name to unload, only supported in swift tuners.
730	
731	        """
732	        from peft import PeftModel as _PeftModel
733	        if isinstance(model, _PeftModel):
734	            model.merge_and_unload()
735	        elif isinstance(model, SwiftModel):
736	            from swift.tuners import LoRA, LoRAConfig
737	            adapter_name = kwargs.get('adapter_name', None)
738	            if isinstance(adapter_name, str):
739	                adapter_name = [adapter_name]
740	            for adapter, output in model.adapters.items():
741	                if isinstance(output.config, LoRAConfig) and (adapter_name is None or adapter in adapter_name):
742	                    LoRA.unpatch_lora(model, output.config, adapter)
743	
744	    @staticmethod
745	    @contextmanager
746	    def grpo_context(model: Union[SwiftModel, torch.nn.Module], processor):
747	        # Save the model and temporarily modify model.model_dir.
748	        if not isinstance(model, SwiftModel):
749	            yield
750	            return
751	        else:
752	            assert len(model.adapters) == 1
753	            adapter = list(model.adapters.values())[0]
754	            if adapter.config.swift_type == SwiftTuners.LLAMAPRO:
755	                from modelscope.hub.utils.utils import get_cache_dir
756	                temp_dir = tempfile.mkdtemp(dir=get_cache_dir())
757	                model_dir = model.model_dir
758	                from transformers.integrations import is_deepspeed_zero3_enabled
759	                if is_deepspeed_zero3_enabled():
760	                    raise ValueError('DeepSpeed ZeRO3 not supported for LLaMAPro&GRPO currently.')
761	                model.base_model.save_pretrained(temp_dir)
762	                processor.save_pretrained(temp_dir)
763	                model.model_dir = temp_dir
764	            yield
765	            if adapter.config.swift_type == SwiftTuners.LLAMAPRO:
766	                model.model_dir = model_dir
767	                shutil.rmtree(temp_dir)
768	
769	    @staticmethod
770	    def merge(model: Union[PeftModel, SwiftModel], **kwargs):
771	        """Merge tuners into the base model, will not unload them.
772	
773	        Args:
774	            model(`Union[PeftModel, SwiftModel]`): The model instance with tuners
775	        """
776	        from .lora_layers import LoraLayer, LoRALayer
777	        for sub_module in model.modules():
778	            if isinstance(sub_module, (LoraLayer, LoRALayer)):
779	                sub_module.merge(**kwargs)
780	
781	    @staticmethod
782	    def unmerge(model: Union[PeftModel, SwiftModel], **kwargs):
783	        """Unmerge tuners from the base model
784	
785	        Args:
786	            model(`Union[PeftModel, SwiftModel]`): The model instance with tuners
787	        """
788	        from .lora_layers import LoraLayer, LoRALayer
789	        for sub_module in model.modules():
790	            if isinstance(sub_module, (LoraLayer, LoRALayer)):
791	                sub_module.unmerge(**kwargs)
792	
793	    @staticmethod
794	    def save_to_peft_format(ckpt_dir: str, output_dir: str) -> None:
795	        """Save swift format to peft format
796	
797	        Args:
798	            ckpt_dir(`str`): Original swift output dir
799	            output_dir(`str`): Converted peft format dir
800	        """
801	        assert ckpt_dir and output_dir, 'Please pass in valid ckpt_dir and output_dir.'
802	        assert os.path.exists(ckpt_dir), f'ckpt_dir: {ckpt_dir} must exists in local disk.'
803	        if os.path.exists(os.path.join(ckpt_dir, SwiftModel.EXTRA_STATE_DIR)):
804	            raise AssertionError('Cannot transfer to peft format, because you are additional state dicts.')
805	
806	        adapter_names = [
807	            sub_dir for sub_dir in os.listdir(ckpt_dir) if os.path.isfile(os.path.join(ckpt_dir, sub_dir, CONFIG_NAME))
808	        ]
809	
810	        def has_custom_content(_json):
811	            if _json.get('swift_type', _json.get('peft_type')) != SwiftTuners.LORA:
812	                logger.warn('Only LoRA can be converted to peft format')
813	                return True
814	
815	            from swift.tuners import LoRAConfig
816	            return not LoRAConfig(**_json).can_be_saved_to_peft()
817	
818	        for adapter in adapter_names:
819	            with open(os.path.join(ckpt_dir, adapter, CONFIG_NAME), encoding='utf-8') as f:
820	                _json = json.load(f)
821	                if has_custom_content(_json):
822	                    raise AssertionError('Cannot transfer to peft format, '
823	                                         'because you have special parameters or adapter types.')
824	
825	        os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)
826	        if ckpt_dir != output_dir:
827	            shutil.copytree(ckpt_dir, output_dir, dirs_exist_ok=True)
828	
829	        for adapter in adapter_names:
830	            safe_serialization = os.path.isfile(os.path.join(output_dir, adapter, SAFETENSORS_WEIGHTS_NAME))
831	            state_dict = SwiftModel.load_state_file(os.path.join(output_dir, adapter))
832	            new_state_dict = {}
833	            for key, value in state_dict.items():
834	                if not key.startswith('base_model.model.'):
835	                    key = 'base_model.model.' + key
836	                key = key.replace(f'lora_A.{adapter}.', 'lora_A.')
837	                key = key.replace(f'lora_B.{adapter}.', 'lora_B.')
838	                key = key.replace(f'lora_embedding_A.{adapter}.', 'lora_embedding_A.')
839	                key = key.replace(f'lora_embedding_B.{adapter}.', 'lora_embedding_B.')
840	                key = key.replace(f'lora_magnitude_vector.{adapter}', 'lora_magnitude_vector')
841	                new_state_dict[key] = value
842	            state_dict = new_state_dict
843	            SwiftModel._save_state_dict(state_dict, os.path.join(output_dir, adapter), safe_serialization)
844	            from swift.tuners import LoRAConfig
845	            with open(os.path.join(output_dir, adapter, CONFIG_NAME), encoding='utf-8') as f:
846	                _json = json.load(f)
847	                peft_config = LoRAConfig(**_json).to_peft_config()
848	            peft_config.save_pretrained(os.path.join(output_dir, adapter))
849	
850	        if 'default' in adapter_names:
851	            shutil.move(os.path.join(output_dir, 'default', CONFIG_NAME), os.path.join(output_dir, CONFIG_NAME))
852	            state_dict = SwiftModel.load_state_file(os.path.join(output_dir, 'default'))
853	            safe_serialization = os.path.isfile(os.path.join(output_dir, 'default', SAFETENSORS_WEIGHTS_NAME))
854	            SwiftModel._save_state_dict(state_dict, output_dir, safe_serialization)
855	            shutil.rmtree(os.path.join(output_dir, 'default'))
856	
857	    @staticmethod
858	    def from_pretrained(model: Union[nn.Module, SwiftModel, PeftModel],
859	                        model_id: str = None,
860	                        adapter_name: Union[str, List[str], Dict[str, str]] = None,
861	                        revision: str = None,
862	                        **kwargs):
863	        """Prepare a model by a model_id in the ModelScope hub or a local dir.
864	
865	        Args:
866	            model(`Union[nn.Module, 'SwiftModel']`): The model to be tuned.
867	            model_id(`str`): The model id of the modelhub or a local dir containing the configs/weights.
868	            adapter_name(`str`, `optional`): The adapter_name to use.
869	            revision(`str`, `optional`): The model revision if the model_id is a model id of the modelhub.
870	            **kwargs:
871	                Extra kwargs needed by ``SwiftModel.from_pretrained`` or ``PeftModel.from_pretrained``.
872	        Returns:
873	            The model wrapped by SwiftModel or PeftModel.
874	        """
875	        if not os.path.exists(model_id):
876	            model_id = snapshot_download(model_id, revision=revision)
877	        is_peft_model = False
878	        if os.path.exists(os.path.join(model_id, CONFIG_NAME)):
879	            with open(os.path.join(model_id, CONFIG_NAME), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
880	                _json = json.load(f)
881	            is_peft_model = SWIFT_TYPE_KEY not in _json
882	
883	        _name = adapter_name if isinstance(
884	            adapter_name, str) or adapter_name is None else adapter_name[0] \
885	            if isinstance(adapter_name, list) else list(adapter_name.keys())[0]
886	        _name = _name or ''
887	        if os.path.exists(os.path.join(model_id, _name, CONFIG_NAME)):
888	            with open(os.path.join(model_id, _name, CONFIG_NAME), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
889	                _json = json.load(f)
890	            is_peft_model = SWIFT_TYPE_KEY not in _json and 'extra_state_keys' not in _json
891	        if is_peft_model:
892	
893	            def load_peft_model(_model, _adapter_name, _new_name=None):
894	                if not _new_name:
895	                    _new_name = _adapter_name
896	                import peft
897	                if not isinstance(_model, peft.PeftModel):
898	                    return PeftModel.from_pretrained(
899	                        _model,
900	                        os.path.join(model_id, _adapter_name) if _adapter_name != 'default'
901	                        and os.path.exists(os.path.join(model_id, _adapter_name)) else model_id,
902	                        revision=revision,
903	                        adapter_name=_new_name,
904	                        **kwargs)
905	                else:
906	                    _model.load_adapter(
907	                        os.path.join(model_id, _adapter_name) if _adapter_name != 'default'
908	                        and os.path.exists(os.path.join(model_id, _adapter_name)) else model_id, _new_name, **kwargs)
909	                    return _model
910	
911	            if not adapter_name:
912	                peft_model = load_peft_model(model, 'default')
913	                for _dir in os.listdir(model_id):
914	                    if os.path.isdir(os.path.join(model_id, _dir)) and \
915	                            os.path.exists(os.path.join(model_id, _dir, CONFIG_NAME)):
916	                        peft_model = load_peft_model(peft_model, _dir)
917	            elif isinstance(adapter_name, str):
918	                return load_peft_model(model, adapter_name)
919	            elif isinstance(adapter_name, list):
920	                peft_model = model
921	                for name in adapter_name:
922	                    peft_model = load_peft_model(peft_model, name)
923	            else:
924	                peft_model = model
925	                for key, value in adapter_name.items():
926	                    peft_model = load_peft_model(peft_model, key, value)
927	            return peft_model
928	        else:
929	            return SwiftModel.from_pretrained(model, model_id, revision=revision, adapter_name=adapter_name, **kwargs)

190	class OffloadHelper:
191	
192	    def __init__(self):
193	        cache_dir = os.path.join(get_cache_dir(), 'offload_cache')
194	        os.makedirs(cache_dir, exist_ok=True)
195	        tmp_dir = tempfile.TemporaryDirectory(dir=cache_dir)
196	        self.cache_dir = tmp_dir.name
197	        self._tmp_dir = tmp_dir
198	        self.index = {}
199	
200	    @staticmethod
201	    def offload_weight(weight, weight_name, offload_folder, index=None):
202	        dtype = None
203	        if str(weight.dtype) == 'torch.bfloat16':
204	            weight = weight.view(torch.int16)
205	            dtype = 'bfloat16'
206	        array = weight.cpu().numpy()
207	        tensor_file = os.path.join(offload_folder, f'{weight_name}.dat')
208	        if index is not None:
209	            if dtype is None:
210	                dtype = str(array.dtype)
211	            index[weight_name] = {'dtype': dtype, 'shape': list(array.shape)}
212	        if array.ndim == 0:
213	            array = array[None]
214	        file_array = np.memmap(tensor_file, dtype=array.dtype, mode='w+', shape=array.shape)
215	        file_array[:] = array[:]
216	        file_array.flush()
217	        return index
218	
219	    @staticmethod
220	    def load_offloaded_weight(weight_file, weight_info):
221	        shape = tuple(weight_info['shape'])
222	        if shape == ():
223	            shape = (1, )
224	
225	        dtype = weight_info['dtype']
226	        if dtype == 'bfloat16':
227	            dtype = 'int16'
228	
229	        weight = np.memmap(weight_file, dtype=dtype, shape=shape, mode='r')
230	
231	        if len(weight_info['shape']) == 0:
232	            weight = weight[0]
233	        weight = torch.tensor(weight)
234	        if weight_info['dtype'] == 'bfloat16':
235	            weight = weight.view(torch.bfloat16)
236	
237	        return weight
238	
239	    def offload_disk(self, module: torch.nn.Module, adapter_name, module_key):
240	        key = adapter_name + ':' + module_key
241	        md5 = hashlib.md5(key.encode('utf-8')).hexdigest()
242	        sub_folder = os.path.join(self.cache_dir, md5)
243	        os.makedirs(sub_folder, exist_ok=True)
244	        state_dict = module.state_dict()
245	        self.index[md5] = {}
246	        for key, tensor in state_dict.items():
247	            OffloadHelper.offload_weight(tensor, key, sub_folder, self.index[md5])
248	
249	    def load_disk(self, module: torch.nn.Module, adapter_name, module_key):
250	        key = adapter_name + ':' + module_key
251	        md5 = hashlib.md5(key.encode('utf-8')).hexdigest()
252	        sub_folder = os.path.join(self.cache_dir, md5)
253	        state_dict = {}
254	        for key, value in self.index[md5].items():
255	            file = os.path.join(sub_folder, f'{key}.dat')
256	            state_dict[key] = OffloadHelper.load_offloaded_weight(file, self.index[md5][key])
257	        if version.parse(torch.__version__) >= version.parse('2.1.0'):
258	            module.load_state_dict(state_dict, assign=True)
259	        else:
260	            for name, _module in module.named_modules():
261	                if len(list(_module.modules())) > 1:
262	                    continue
263	
264	                buffers = {}
265	                prefix = name if not name else name + '.'
266	                for sub_name, buffer in _module.named_buffers():
267	                    buffer_cls = type(buffer)
268	                    buffers[sub_name] = buffer_cls(state_dict[prefix + sub_name])
269	                _module._buffers.update(buffers)
270	                params = {}
271	                for sub_name, param in _module.named_parameters():
272	                    param_cls = type(param)
273	                    params[sub_name] = param_cls(state_dict[prefix + sub_name], requires_grad=param.requires_grad)
274	                _module._parameters.update(params)
275	        shutil.rmtree(sub_folder, ignore_errors=True)

278	class SwiftAdapter:
279	
280	    offload_helper = None
281	
282	    @staticmethod
283	    def prepare_model(model: torch.nn.Module, config: SwiftConfig, adapter_name: str) -> SwiftOutput:
284	        raise NotImplementedError
285	
286	    @staticmethod
287	    def activate_adapter(module: torch.nn.Module, adapter_name: str, activate: bool, offload: str = None):
288	        raise NotImplementedError
289	
290	    @staticmethod
291	    def save_memory(module: torch.nn.Module, adapter_name: str, module_key: str, activate: bool, offload: str = None):
292	        if not isinstance(module, torch.nn.Module):
293	            return
294	        if activate:
295	            SwiftAdapter.load(module, adapter_name, module_key)
296	        else:
297	            SwiftAdapter.offload(module, adapter_name, module_key, offload=offload)
298	
299	    @staticmethod
300	    def offload(module: torch.nn.Module, adapter_name, module_key, offload: str):
301	        if not offload:
302	            return
303	        device = next(iter(module.parameters())).device
304	        if hasattr(module, 'origin_device') and module.origin_device != str(device):
305	            return
306	        module.origin_device = str(device)
307	        if offload == 'cpu':
308	            if str(device) != 'cpu':
309	                module.to('cpu')
310	        elif offload == 'meta':
311	            if str(device) != 'meta':
312	                if SwiftAdapter.offload_helper is None:
313	                    SwiftAdapter.offload_helper = OffloadHelper()
314	                SwiftAdapter.offload_helper.offload_disk(module, adapter_name=adapter_name, module_key=module_key)
315	                module.to('meta')
316	        else:
317	            raise NotImplementedError
318	        gc_collect()
319	
320	    @staticmethod
321	    def load(module: torch.nn.Module, adapter_name, module_key):
322	        device = next(iter(module.parameters())).device
323	        if not hasattr(module, 'origin_device') or module.origin_device == str(device):
324	            return
325	        if str(device) == 'cpu':
326	            module.to(module.origin_device)
327	            delattr(module, 'origin_device')
328	        elif str(device) == 'meta':
329	            SwiftAdapter.offload_helper.load_disk(module, adapter_name=adapter_name, module_key=module_key)
330	            module.to(module.origin_device)
331	            delattr(module, 'origin_device')
332	
333	    @classmethod
334	    def get_model_key_mapping(cls, model_type, config) -> ModelKeys:
335	
336	        if model_type in MODEL_ARCH_MAPPING.keys():
337	            model_key_mapping = MODEL_ARCH_MAPPING[model_type]
338	        else:
339	            model_key_mapping = config.model_key_mapping
340	
341	        if model_key_mapping is None:
342	            raise ValueError(f'{model_type} is not defined in MODEL_KEYS_MAPPING, '
343	                             f'please consider pass the information through the config.model_key_mapping')
344	
345	        if isinstance(model_key_mapping, dict):
346	            model_key_mapping: ModelKeys = ModelKeys(**model_key_mapping)
347	        return model_key_mapping
348	
349	    @staticmethod
350	    def state_dict_load_hook(model: torch.nn.Module, state_dict: Dict[str, torch.Tensor]):
351	        pass
352	
353	    @staticmethod
354	    def has_additional_modules():
355	        return True
356	
357	
358	class ModulesToSaveWrapper(ActivationMixin, _ModulesToSaveWrapper):
359	
360	    def __init__(self, *args, module_key, **kwargs):
361	        super(ModulesToSaveWrapper, self).__init__(module_key)
362	        super(ActivationMixin, self).__init__(*args, **kwargs)
363	        SwiftAdapter.save_memory(self.original_module, 'original_module', self.module_key, False, offload='cpu')
364	
365	    @property
366	    def active_adapter(self):
367	        active_adapters = self.get_activated_adapters()
368	        if not active_adapters:
369	            return None
370	        elif len(active_adapters) > 1:
371	            raise ValueError('ModulesToSaveWrapper does not support multiple active adapters')
372	        return active_adapters[0]
373	
374	    def set_adapter(self, adapter_name: str, offload: str = None):
375	        if adapter_name not in self.modules_to_save:
376	            raise ValueError(f'Adapter {adapter_name} not found in {self.modules_to_save.keys()}')
377	        self.modules_to_save[adapter_name].requires_grad_(True)
378	        self.set_activation(adapter_name, True)
379	        SwiftAdapter.save_memory(self.modules_to_save[adapter_name], adapter_name, self.module_key, True)
380	        SwiftAdapter.save_memory(self.original_module, 'original_module', self.module_key, False, offload=offload)
381	
382	    def deactivate_adapter(self, adapter_name: str, offload: str = None):
383	        if adapter_name in self.modules_to_save and self.unique_thread:
384	            self.modules_to_save[adapter_name].requires_grad_(False)
385	        self.set_activation(adapter_name, False)
386	        SwiftAdapter.save_memory(
387	            self.modules_to_save[adapter_name], adapter_name, self.module_key, False, offload=offload)
388	        if not self.get_activated_adapters():
389	            SwiftAdapter.save_memory(self.original_module, 'original_module', self.module_key, True)
390	
391	    def enable_adapters(self, enabled: bool):
392	        super().enable_adapters(enabled)
393	        if not enabled:
394	            SwiftAdapter.save_memory(self.original_module, 'original_module', self.module_key, False, offload='meta')
395	        else:
396	            SwiftAdapter.save_memory(self.original_module, 'original_module', self.module_key, True)
397	
398	
399	def set_adapter(model, adapter_name, activate, offload):
400	    for module in model.modules():
401	        if isinstance(module, ModulesToSaveWrapper):
402	            if activate:
403	                module.set_adapter(adapter_name, offload)
404	            else:
405	                module.deactivate_adapter(adapter_name, offload)
406	
407	
408	def set_trainable(model, adapter_name):
409	    key_list = [key for key, _ in model.named_modules()]
410	    for key in key_list:
411	        target_module_found = any(key.endswith(target_key) for target_key in model.modules_to_save)
412	        if target_module_found:
413	            parent, target, target_name = _get_submodules(model, key)
414	            if isinstance(target, ModulesToSaveWrapper):
415	                target.update(adapter_name)
416	                target.set_adapter(target.active_adapter)
417	            else:
418	                new_module = ModulesToSaveWrapper(target, module_key=key, adapter_name=adapter_name)
419	                new_module.set_adapter(adapter_name)
420	                setattr(parent, target_name, new_module)
421	
422	
423	def swift_to_peft_format(ckpt_dir: str, output_dir: str) -> str:
424	    if 'default' in os.listdir(ckpt_dir):  # swift_backend
425	        from swift import Swift
426	        Swift.save_to_peft_format(ckpt_dir, output_dir)
427	        ckpt_dir = output_dir
428	        logger.info(f'Converting the swift format checkpoint to peft format, and saving it to: `{output_dir}`')
429	    else:
430	        logger.info('The format of the checkpoint is already in peft format.')
431	    return ckpt_dir

10	from .utils import ActivationMixin, SwiftAdapter, SwiftConfig, SwiftOutput
11	
12	logger = get_logger()
13	
14	
15	@dataclass
16	class LLaMAProConfig(SwiftConfig):
17	    """
18	    The configuration class for the LLaMAPro module.
19	
20	    See https://arxiv.org/abs/2401.02415
21	
22	    Args:
23	        model_type(`str`): LLaMAPro only support parts of the LLM models because of the variables need to be manually
24	            modified.
25	        num_new_blocks(`int`): How many new blocks need to be added
26	        num_groups(`int`): The groups of new blocks are split to. Default equals to `num_new_blocks` which means each
27	            single layer will be inserted into every `num_hidden_layers/num_new_blocks` original layers.
28	    """
29	    model_type: str = field(
30	        default=None, metadata={
31	            'choices': list(MODEL_ARCH_MAPPING.keys()),
32	        })
33	
34	    num_new_blocks: int = None
35	
36	    num_groups: Optional[int] = None
37	
38	    def __post_init__(self):
39	        from .mapping import SwiftTuners
40	        self.swift_type = SwiftTuners.LLAMAPRO
41	
42	
43	class LLaMAPro(SwiftAdapter):
44	
45	    @staticmethod
46	    def prepare_model(model: nn.Module, config: LLaMAProConfig, adapter_name: str) -> SwiftOutput:
47	        """Prepare a model with `LLaMAProConfig`"""
48	        num_hidden_layers = HfConfigFactory.get_config_attr(model.config, 'num_hidden_layers')
49	        if num_hidden_layers is None:
50	            num_hidden_layers = HfConfigFactory.get_config_attr(model.config, 'num_layers')
51	        assert num_hidden_layers is not None, 'Cannot find num of layers config'
52	        assert num_hidden_layers % config.num_new_blocks == 0, f'Model layers {num_hidden_layers} ' \
53	                                                               f'should be divided by {config.num_new_blocks}'
54	        if config.num_groups is None:
55	            config.num_groups = config.num_new_blocks
56	
57	        # the except block will change the model_type, this will cause `model not found` error
58	        # when using internvl
59	        origin_model_type = config.model_type
60	        model_type = origin_model_type
61	        num_stride = num_hidden_layers // config.num_groups
62	        try:
63	            module_list = LLaMAPro._find_module_list(config, model)
64	        except AssertionError as e:
65	            model_type = LLaMAPro.search_correct_model_type(model)
66	            if model_type is None:
67	                language_model_name = SwiftAdapter.get_model_key_mapping(config.model_type, config).language_model
68	                if language_model_name:
69	                    if isinstance(language_model_name, str):
70	                        language_model_name = [language_model_name]
71	                    language_model = model.get_submodule(language_model_name[0])
72	                    model_type = LLaMAPro.search_correct_model_type(language_model)
73	                    if model_type:
74	                        model = language_model
75	
76	            if model_type:
77	                config.model_type = model_type
78	                module_list = LLaMAPro._find_module_list(config, model)
79	            else:
80	                raise e
81	
82	        new_module_list = nn.ModuleList()
83	        new_module_idx = []
84	        layer_types = getattr(model.config, 'layer_types', None)
85	        _new_layer_type = []
86	        for idx, module in enumerate(module_list):
87	            new_module_list.append(module)
88	            _layer_type = layer_types[idx] if layer_types else None
89	            _new_layer_type.append(_layer_type)
90	            if (idx + 1) % num_stride == 0:
91	                new_module = deepcopy(module)
92	                ActivationMixin.mark_all_sub_modules_as_plugin(new_module)
93	                new_module_list.append(new_module)
94	                new_module_idx.append(idx + 1 + len(new_module_idx))
95	                _new_layer_type.append(_layer_type)
96	
97	        if layer_types is not None:
98	            model.config.layer_types = _new_layer_type
99	        LLaMAPro._update_module_weight(config, new_module_list, new_module_idx)
100	        LLaMAPro._update_module_attr(config, new_module_list)
101	        model.config.num_hidden_layers = len(new_module_list)
102	        LLaMAPro._set_module_list(config, model, new_module_list)
103	
104	        def activate_module(activate: bool):
105	            if activate:
106	                LLaMAPro._update_module_attr(config, new_module_list)
107	                LLaMAPro._set_module_list(config, model, new_module_list)
108	            else:
109	                LLaMAPro._update_module_attr(config, module_list)
110	                LLaMAPro._set_module_list(config, model, module_list)
111	
112	        def state_dict_callback(state_dict, adapter_name, **kwargs):
113	            model_key_mapping = LLaMAPro.get_model_key_mapping(model_type, config)
114	            new_module_list = [model_key_mapping.module_list + f'.{i}' for i in new_module_idx]
115	            return {
116	                key: value
117	                for key, value in state_dict.items() if any([m_part in key for m_part in new_module_list])
118	            }
119	
120	        def mark_trainable_callback(model):
121	            model_key_mapping = LLaMAPro.get_model_key_mapping(model_type, config)
122	            new_module_list = [model_key_mapping.module_list + f'.{i}' for i in new_module_idx]
123	            for name, parameter in model.named_parameters():
124	                parameter: nn.Parameter
125	                if any([m_part in name for m_part in new_module_list]):
126	                    parameter.requires_grad = True
127	
128	        config.model_type = origin_model_type
129	        model.activate_module = activate_module
130	        return SwiftOutput(
131	            config=config, state_dict_callback=state_dict_callback, mark_trainable_callback=mark_trainable_callback)
132	
133	    @staticmethod
134	    def _update_module_attr(config: LLaMAProConfig, module_list):
135	        model_type = config.model_type
136	        model_key_mapping = LLaMAPro.get_model_key_mapping(model_type, config)
137	        attention = model_key_mapping.attention
138	        attention = attention.split('{}.')[1]
139	        if model_type == 'phi3-small':
140	            raise ValueError('phi3-small does not support llamapro currently')
141	        if model_type in ('llama', 'mistral', 'qwen2', 'yi', 'gemma', 'deepseek', 'openbuddy', 'xverse', 'orion',
142	                          'bluelm', 'ziya', 'skywork', 'deepseek-v2', 'minicpm', 'phi3', 'internlm2'):
143	            for idx, module in enumerate(module_list):
144	                try:
145	                    getattr(module, attention).layer_idx = idx
146	                except AttributeError:
147	                    getattr(module, 'cross_attn').layer_idx = idx
148	        elif model_type in ('chatglm', 'chatglm4'):
149	            for idx, module in enumerate(module_list):
150	                getattr(module, attention).layer_number = idx
151	        elif model_type in ('phi2', ):
152	            for idx, module in enumerate(module_list):
153	                getattr(module, attention).block_idx = idx
154	        else:
155	            for idx, module in enumerate(module_list):
156	                attrs = [
157	                    attr for attr in dir(getattr(module_list[0], attention))
158	                    if attr in ('layer_idx', 'layer_number', 'block_idx')
159	                ]
160	                assert len(attrs) <= 1
161	                if attrs:
162	                    setattr(getattr(module, attention), attrs[0], idx)
163	                else:
164	                    logger.warn(f'model_type: {model_type} seems has no layer_idx, if you encountered anything wrong,'
165	                                f'please give us a feedback.')
166	
167	    @classmethod
168	    def get_model_key_mapping(cls, model_type, config) -> ModelKeys:
169	
170	        model_key_mapping = SwiftAdapter.get_model_key_mapping(model_type, config)
171	        assert model_key_mapping.o_proj is not None and model_key_mapping.down_proj is not None, \
172	            'LLaMAPro only support models with o_proj and down_proj components.'
173	        return model_key_mapping
174	
175	    @classmethod
176	    def search_correct_model_type(cls, module: nn.Module):
177	        for arch_name, arch_type in MODEL_ARCH_MAPPING.items():
178	            arch_type: ModelKeys
179	            if getattr(arch_type, 'module_list') is None:
180	                # Need to be a LLM arch
181	                continue
182	
183	            matched = True
184	            for f in fields(arch_type):
185	                arch_str = getattr(arch_type, f.name)
186	                if f.name == 'arch_name' or arch_str is None:
187	                    continue
188	
189	                arch_str = arch_str.replace('{}', '0')
190	                try:
191	                    sub_module = module.get_submodule(arch_str)
192	                    if sub_module is None:
193	                        matched = False
194	                except AttributeError:
195	                    matched = False
196	
197	                if not matched:
198	                    break
199	
200	            if matched:
201	                return arch_name
202	
203	    @staticmethod
204	    def _update_module_weight(config: LLaMAProConfig, module_list, new_module_idx):
205	        model_key_mapping = LLaMAPro.get_model_key_mapping(config.model_type, config)
206	        o_proj = model_key_mapping.o_proj.split('{}.')[1]
207	        down_proj = model_key_mapping.down_proj.split('{}.')[1]
208	
209	        for idx, module in enumerate(module_list):
210	            if idx not in new_module_idx:
211	                continue
212	            _o_proj: nn.Linear = module.get_submodule(o_proj)
213	            _down_proj: nn.Linear = module.get_submodule(down_proj)
214	            _o_proj.weight.data = torch.zeros_like(_o_proj.weight.data)
215	            _down_proj.weight.data = torch.zeros_like(_down_proj.weight.data)
216	            if hasattr(_o_proj, 'bias') and _o_proj.bias is not None:
217	                _o_proj.bias.data = torch.zeros_like(_o_proj.bias)
218	            if hasattr(_down_proj, 'bias') and _down_proj.bias is not None:
219	                _down_proj.bias.data = torch.zeros_like(_down_proj.bias)
220	
221	    @staticmethod
222	    def _set_module_list(config, module: nn.Module, module_list: nn.ModuleList):
223	        model_key_mapping = LLaMAPro.get_model_key_mapping(config.model_type, config)
224	        idx = model_key_mapping.module_list.rfind('.')
225	        parent = module.get_submodule(model_key_mapping.module_list[:idx])
226	        setattr(parent, model_key_mapping.module_list[idx + 1:], module_list)
227	
228	    @staticmethod
229	    def _find_module_list(config, module: nn.Module) -> nn.ModuleList:
230	        model_key_mapping = LLaMAPro.get_model_key_mapping(config.model_type, config)
231	        return module.get_submodule(model_key_mapping.module_list)
232	
233	    @staticmethod
234	    def activate_adapter(module: torch.nn.Module, adapter_name: str, activate: bool, offload: str = None):
235	        module.activate_module(activate)
236	
237	    @staticmethod
238	    def has_additional_modules():
239	        return True
240

37	    dim: int = field(default=None, metadata={'help': 'The dimension of the hidden states'})

39	    target_modules: Union[str, List[str]] = field(
40	        default=None,
41	        metadata={
42	            'help':
43	            'The feedforward module to be replaced. in regex format if this argument is str, '
44	            'else will match with `end with` if List[str].'
45	        })
46	
47	    hidden_pos: Union[str, int] = field(
48	        default=None,
49	        metadata={
50	            'help': 'The position of the hidden state to be passed into the adapter, can be int (args) or str (kwargs)'
51	        })

53	    method_name: str = field(default='forward', metadata={'help': 'The method to be replaced, default is `forward`'})

65	class Adapter(SwiftAdapter):
66	
67	    @staticmethod
68	    def prepare_model(model: nn.Module, config: AdapterConfig, adapter_name: str) -> SwiftOutput:
69	        """Prepare a model with `AdapterConfig`"""
70	        module_keys = [key for key, _ in model.named_modules()]
71	
72	        for module_key in module_keys:
73	            if isinstance(config.target_modules, str):
74	                target_module_found = re.fullmatch(config.target_modules, module_key)
75	            else:
76	                target_module_found = any(module_key.endswith(target_key) for target_key in config.target_modules)
77	
78	            if target_module_found:  # noqa
79	                module = model.get_submodule(module_key)
80	
81	                def _forward(self, *args, **kwargs):
82	                    args = getattr(self, f'forward_origin_{adapter_name}')(*args, **kwargs)
83	                    if isinstance(args, (tuple, list, dict)):
84	                        if isinstance(config.hidden_pos, int):
85	                            _type = type(args)
86	                            args = list(args)
87	                            args[config.hidden_pos] = getattr(self, f'adapter_{adapter_name}')(args[config.hidden_pos])
88	                            args = _type(args)
89	                        else:
90	                            args[config.hidden_pos] = getattr(self, f'adapter_{adapter_name}')(args[config.hidden_pos])
91	                    elif isinstance(args, torch.Tensor):
92	                        args = getattr(self, f'adapter_{adapter_name}')(args)
93	                    return args
94	
95	                def _feed_forward_chunk(self, attention_output):
96	                    return _forward(self, attention_output)
97	
98	                # TODO The `config.method_name` method should not be replaced twice.
99	
100	                setattr(module, f'forward_origin_{adapter_name}', getattr(module, config.method_name))
101	                num_args_in_forward_chunk_fn = len(
102	                    inspect.signature(getattr(module, f'forward_origin_{adapter_name}')).parameters)
103	                if config.method_name == 'feed_forward_chunk' and num_args_in_forward_chunk_fn == 1:
104	                    setattr(module, config.method_name, types.MethodType(_feed_forward_chunk, module))
105	                else:
106	                    setattr(module, config.method_name, types.MethodType(_forward, module))
107	                adapter_module = AdapterModule(config.dim, adapter_name, module_key, config.adapter_length,
108	                                               ACT2CLS[config.act_layer])
109	                setattr(module, f'adapter_{adapter_name}', adapter_module)
110	                logger.info(f'Adapter modules(module_key): {module_key}.adapter_{adapter_name}')
111	
112	        def state_dict_callback(state_dict, adapter_name: str, **kwargs):
113	            return {key: value for key, value in state_dict.items() if f'adapter_{adapter_name}' in key}
114	
115	        def mark_trainable_callback(model):
116	            return
117	
118	        return SwiftOutput(
119	            config=config, state_dict_callback=state_dict_callback, mark_trainable_callback=mark_trainable_callback)
120	
121	    @staticmethod
122	    def activate_adapter(module: torch.nn.Module, adapter_name: str, activate: bool, offload: str = None):
123	        modules = find_sub_module(module, f'adapter_{adapter_name}')
124	        for _module in modules:
125	            _module: ActivationMixin
126	            _module: nn.Module
127	            _module.set_activation(adapter_name, activate)
128	            SwiftAdapter.save_memory(_module, adapter_name, _module.module_key, activate, offload)
129	
130	
131	class AdapterModule(nn.Module, ActivationMixin):
132	    """The implementation of adapter tuning method.
133	
134	    Adapters project input tokens by an MLP layer.
135	    'Parameter-Efficient Transfer Learning for NLP' by Houlsby et al.(2019)
136	    See http://arxiv.org/abs/1902.00751
137	
138	    Args:
139	        dim: An integer indicating the embedding dimension.
140	        adapter_length: An integer indicating the length of adapter tuning.
141	    """
142	
143	    def __init__(
144	        self,
145	        dim,
146	        adapter_name,
147	        module_key,
148	        adapter_length=None,
149	        act_layer=nn.GELU,
150	    ):
151	        super(AdapterModule, self).__init__()
152	        super(nn.Module, self).__init__(module_key)
153	        self.dim = dim
154	        self.adapter_name = adapter_name
155	        self.adapter_length = adapter_length
156	        self.linear1 = nn.Linear(dim, adapter_length)
157	        self.act = act_layer()
158	        self.linear2 = nn.Linear(adapter_length, dim)
159	        self.init_weights()
160	        self._prepared = False
161	        self.mark_all_sub_modules_as_plugin()
162	
163	    def init_weights(self):
164	
165	        def _init_weights(m):
166	            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
167	                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
168	                nn.init.normal_(m.bias, std=1e-6)
169	
170	        self.apply(_init_weights)
171	
172	    def forward(self, x, identity=None):
173	        if not self.is_activated(self.adapter_name):
174	            return x
175	        if not self._prepared:
176	            self.linear1.to(x.device)
177	            self.act.to(x.device)
178	            self.linear2.to(x.device)
179	            self._prepared = True
180	
181	        x_dtype = x.dtype
182	        x = x.to(self.linear1.weight.dtype)
183	        out = self.linear2(self.act(self.linear1(x)))
184	        if identity is None:
185	            identity = x
186	        identity = identity.to(out.dtype)
187	        out = identity + out
188	        return out.to(x_dtype)
189
